query:
-- Sample of unmatched services that have addresses
SELECT externalId, serviceType, supplierName, phoneNumber, locationAddress, customerName
FROM services
WHERE (customerExternalId IS NULL OR customerExternalId = '')
  AND locationAddress IS NOT NULL AND locationAddress != ''
ORDER BY supplierName, locationAddress
LIMIT 20;
